title: Boundary GeoJSON provenance sidecar
description: CLAUDE.md §12 provenance sidecar for a sibling boundary GeoJSON file. GeoJSON (RFC 7946 §7.1) reserves all top-level members; rather than muddle the artifact with non-spec metadata, a sibling `<file>.sources.json` carries the required `sources` array on its behalf. Emitted by tools/boundaries/snapshot.py.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Locks the sidecar shape (for, sources) so the two-tier validator (CLAUDE.md §11) accepts these files instead of flagging them as orphans.

for.description: Basename of the sibling GeoJSON this sidecar describes (e.g. "S22-ac.geojson").

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. An empty array signals hand-authored content.
